mapper.select: select count(*) from post where post_status = 0 and category_idx = #{category_idx}
mapper.insert: insert into post( category_idx, post_title, post_content, post_views, post_likes, post_comments_count, post_status, post_created_at, post_star) values ( #{category_idx}, #{post_title}, #{post_content}, #{post_views}, #{post_likes}, #{post_comments_count}, #{post_status}, now(), #{post_star})
mapper.select:
SELECT a.* FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY post_idx DESC) AS rnum, post.* FROM post
c.rnum Between #{begin} and #{end}, c.post_title LIKE CONCAT ('%', #{searchValue}, '%')
c.post_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchValue}, '%')
m.member_nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchValue}, '%')
a.rnum BETWEEN #{begin} AND #{end};
